{"rule":"THE_SUPERLATIVE","sentence":"^\\QDetermine which of the following sets are groups under addition: the set of rational numbers (including \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q) in lowest terms whose denominators are odd the set of rational numbers (including \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q) in lowest terms whose denominators are even the set of rational numbers of absolute value \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q the set of rational numbers of absolute value \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q together with \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q the set of rational numbers with denominators equal to \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q or \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q the set of rational numbers with denominators equal to \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q, \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+\\Q, or \\E(?:Dummy|Ina|Jimmy-|Dummy-|Maniquí-|Maniquíes-|Atrapa-|Dummy\\+|Dummy's\\+)[0-9]+$"}
